lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: Hello mortal. What do you seek?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What changes have been made for this League?

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: Much has happened since the last passage of the Trailblazers. This time, I have awakened the wrathful spirits of enemies across Gielinor.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: Each region now contains a Raging Echo boss. These bosses are more powerful versions of their original self that drop unique rewards.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: To help you overcome these new challenges, you may now gain power through Combat Masteries, which you can obtain access to by completing the Combat Mastery tasks.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: As before, you'll initially be restricted to the Regions of Misthalin and Karamja. However, as you progress, you'll be able to unlock new areas of your choosing.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: Be warned though - you won't be able to unlock every area, so choose wisely.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: You must participate as an Ironman. This means you stand alone and cannot trade with other participants.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: And that's not all. Training skills during the League will grant you substantially more experience than you'd normally expect.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: These experience increases are known as passive effects, which get more generous the higher your Relic tier.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: Finally, some quests have been completed for you automatically. Further quests and more will be completed as you unlock the relevant areas.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: I think that covers the basics. Would you like to know more, [player name]?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not right now.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: Is there anything else you need from me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me about Combat Masteries?

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: Combat Masteries are powerful boons granted by me that enhance your combat abilities for the entire League.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: After all, it wouldn't be very interesting to ask you to defeat the enemies' raging echoes without allowing you to draw on your own.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: You can obtain them by completing specific combat tasks to prove yourself to me.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: Combat Masteries are split into the three combat styles: Ranged, Melee, and Mage. To unlock each mastery, you must have unlocked the previous mastery for that style.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: There are 6 combat masteries for each style, but only 10 mastery points can be obtained. Once you have selected a mastery there is no going back, so choose your masteries wisely.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: Now, would you like to take a look at the Combat Masteries available to you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not right now.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: Fair enough. Is there anything else you need from me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do tasks work?

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: In every League, there are a number of tasks for you to complete. Each task has a level of difficulty: Easy, Medium, Hard, Elite and Master.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: Completing tasks allows you to access new areas. The more tasks you complete, the more areas become available to unlock.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: Not only that, completing tasks also earns you League Points. The number of points earned is dependent on the difficulty of the task.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do these points do?

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: Once you have achieved a certain amount of League Points you can unlock a new Relic of mine. These are powerful artefacts to help you in this world.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: League Points can also be used to buy rewards from the Leagues Reward Shop.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So how many tasks are there?

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: More than you'll ever be able to complete, most likely. It's up to you which ones you attempt.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: Now, would you like to take a look at the tasks for this League?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not right now.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: Is there anything else you need from me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How does the area system work?

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: Currently, you are restricted to the Kingdom of Misthalin and the island of Karamja. However, as you progress, you can unlock more areas.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: There are eleven different areas in total. However, you can only unlock a maximum of five, including the two you've started with. Choose wisely.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: I give the first two area unlocks to everyone. You can unlock the other three by completing the tasks I've set.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: The more tasks you complete, the more areas you can unlock.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. Thanks!

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: Would you like to take a look at the available areas now?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not right now.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: Fair enough. Is there anything else you need from me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are Relics?

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: Relics are powerful artefacts made by me that grant unique abilities for the entire League.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: You may even recognise a few from Leagues past.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: There are 23 separate Relics, split across 8 different tiers. You can only have one Relic from each tier, however.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: The first Relic tier is available to everyone. The others must be unlocked with League Points.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: League Points are earned by completing tasks.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: Once you have selected a Relic, your choice can't be changed for the rest of the League. Make your choices carefully.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: Would you like to take a look at the Relics for this League?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not right now.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: Very well. Is there anything else you need from me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I claim some combat achievement rewards?

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: You do not appear to have any combat achievement rewards available to claim.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: You don't have enough room.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: You don't have enough gold.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: There you go. Congratulations, even if it may have been accelerated with my power, it's still a real accomplishment.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have some more questions.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about League rewards.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: As well as letting you unlock new areas, completing tasks in the League will earn you League Points. The more League Points you have, the more Relic tiers you have available.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: However, alongside allowing you to unlock Relics, League Points can also be used to buy rewards from the Leagues Reward Shop.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What rewards can I buy?

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: Oh, all sorts of things. New cosmetic kits, an alternative Home Teleport animation, some rather stylish outfits... and much more.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: Many of these rewards can be traded with your fellow mortals, so if you wish, you can earn some money by selling them on. Of course, you might prefer to keep them for yourself instead.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. That all sounds good to me.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: You can use this shop to buy previous League rewards, too.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: Alongside the rewards in the Leagues Reward Shop, there's also League Ranks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: League Ranks? How do they work?

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: During the League as you gain more points you will gain a League Rank. This rank can be seen in the Ranks interface.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: You currently have the rank: [rank].

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: As you get ranks you will gain access to trophies.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Trophies?

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: That's right. Trophies are items that are awarded to you for competing in the League. You can use them to show off your League Rank.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: Connected to League Ranks are the League to League rewards. These are unlocked in the next League based upon the League Rank you earn in this one.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: League Starter Outfits and League Icons are some of things you can unlock for the next League. In addition, any pets you earn in this League will transfer over to the next one.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: Finally, on top of the tasks for this League, there are some other activities for which I will recognise the first person who completes them.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: You can view the entire list of activities, as well as whether or not someone has completed them, by reading the board beside me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: My pleasure. Now, is there anything else you need from me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's talk about pets.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me how pets work in Leagues?

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: But of course. If you're lucky enough to obtain a pet during a League, it will automatically be insured for you.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: This means that if you lose it somehow you can talk to me and I'll give it back to you. Insurance and reclaiming is all free of charge.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: Additionally, each pet you obtain will be transferred to the next League. I'll take good care of it until you're ready to reclaim it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay! Thank you.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: Come back to me once you have some pets and you can view your collection. Now, is there anything else you need from me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do I have any League items to collect?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you help me smash vials?

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: With all of my power, this is something I can manage. You will now automatically smash vials.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: With all of my power, this is something I can manage. You will no longer smash vials automatically.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's circle back.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm good, thanks.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: Very well. I'll be here if you ever need to know anything more.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: Oh my, that's a rare thing you've got there.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: I guess you'll be wanting to trade it in for one of Gielinor's powerful weapons.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: Enjoy.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: Enjoy.

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: Enjoy.

sections.title: Attempting to change spell animation overrides

lines.speaker: The Sage
lines.text: You cannot do that in this world, you must abide by my rules, mortal.
